title: Foundations
description: Basic math skills: arithmetic, fractions, percentages, factorials, combinations, algebra, and set theory.

lessons.title: Basic Arithmetic
lessons.content:
## Basic Arithmetic

Review addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division with whole numbers and decimals.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Fractions and Decimals
lessons.content:
## Fractions and Decimals

Convert between fractions and decimals. Add and subtract fractions.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Percentages
lessons.content:

lessons.title: Factorials
